record.field: Formbricks is an open-source experience management platform for building surveys and forms and collecting user feedback across every touchpoint.

Formbricks is an open-source experience management platform for building surveys and forms and collecting user feedback across every touchpoint.

Positioned as an open-source alternative to Qualtrics and Typeform, Formbricks lets product, research and marketing teams design link, email, website and in-app surveys with a no-code editor and template library. It can trigger surveys based on user behavior, target specific audiences without code changes, and aggregate responses into actionable insights. Built on a privacy-first design, it can be fully self-hosted via Docker for complete data sovereignty.

Key features
  • No-code survey editor with link, email, website and in-app survey types
  • Behavioral triggering on page views, clicks and custom events
  • Audience targeting and user attributes without changing application code
  • Built-in analytics with aggregated, intuitive result reporting
  • Integrations and SDKs for Slack, Notion, Zapier, n8n and open APIs
  • Self-hostable via Docker with Kubernetes and Redis support for scale
Best for

Product, UX research, growth and marketing teams that need privacy-compliant feedback collection and want to keep survey data on their own infrastructure.

services: postgres: restart: always image: pgvector/pgvector:pg17 volumes: - ./postgres:/var/lib/postgresql/data environment: - POSTGRES_PASSWORD=postgres container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}_postgres' networks: - internal formbricks: environment: WEBAPP_URL: ${WEBAPP_URL} NEXTAUTH_URL: ${NEXTAUTH_URL} DATABASE_URL: postgresql://postgres:postgres@postgres:5432/formbricks?schema=public NEXTAUTH_SECRET: ${NEXTAUTH_SECRET} ENCRYPTION_KEY: ${ENCRYPTION_KEY} CRON_SECRET: ${CRON_SECRET} EMAIL_VERIFICATION_DISABLED: 1 PASSWORD_RESET_DISABLED: 1 S3_FORCE_PATH_STYLE: 0 restart: always image: ghcr.io/formbricks/formbricks:v3.1.5 depends_on: - postgres ports: - '{{ PORT_HTTP }}:3000' volumes: - ../files/uploads:/home/nextjs/apps/web/uploads/ container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}' networks: - internal - agz-proxy-network networks: internal: driver: bridge agz-proxy-network: external: true
